about.title: ABOUT ME
about.description: I am Rómulo Palacios, Information Technology Engineer. My career is defined by three pillars: Development (Web/Mobile/IoT), Quality (QA & Testing), and Strategy (Data Analysis). I am dedicated to creating technological tools that optimize processes and generate real value. Always ready for the next technical challenge and continuous learning in demanding environments.

items.description: Intensive specialization in software test automation. Design and execution of E2E frameworks for Web and Mobile using BDD methodologies focused on quality and scalability.

items.description: Development of comprehensive IoT architecture (Python, MQTT, PostgreSQL) with real-time data visualization via a cross-platform mobile application in Flutter.

items.title: Web Memories
items.description: Web Memories is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that allows couples and families to create, enrich, and relive shared memories.

items.title: Mysterious Invitation
items.description: The experience is designed as a mystery to solve. The destination won't be revealed until all interactive riddles are completed. All with a minimalist, modern design full of micro-interactions.
